tasks.title: Design user authentication flow
tasks.description: Create wireframes and user journey for login/signup. Include password reset, two-factor authentication, and OAuth integration planning.

tasks.title: Implement JWT token system
tasks.description: Backend authentication using JWT tokens with refresh token logic. Include token expiration, blacklist mechanism, and revocation endpoints.

tasks.title: Create dashboard layout
tasks.description: Build responsive dashboard UI with React components. Include sidebar navigation, top bar, and responsive grid system for content.

tasks.title: Setup PostgreSQL database
tasks.description: Configure database, run migrations, setup connection pooling with PgBouncer. Include backup and restoration procedures.

tasks.title: API documentation
tasks.description: Write OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for all endpoints. Include request/response examples, error codes, and authentication details.

tasks.title: Setup CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing, linting, and deployment. Include Docker image building and registry push.

tasks.title: User profile page
tasks.description: Build user profile view with edit capabilities. Allow users to update name, email, avatar, and preferences.

tasks.title: Email notification system
tasks.description: Implement email notifications using SendGrid or similar service. Include welcome emails, password reset, and activity notifications.

tasks.title: Setup error tracking
tasks.description: Integrate Sentry or similar error tracking service. Include error logging, alerting, and monitoring dashboards.

tasks.title: Create user onboarding flow
tasks.description: Design and implement guided onboarding experience for new users. Include tooltips, tutorials, and completion tracking.

tasks.title: Database indexing optimization
tasks.description: Review and optimize database queries. Add appropriate indexes and analyze query performance with EXPLAIN plans.

tasks.title: Implement caching strategy
tasks.description: Setup Redis caching for frequently accessed data. Include cache invalidation strategy and TTL configuration.

tasks.title: Create mobile responsive tests
tasks.description: Write automated tests for mobile responsiveness. Include breakpoint testing for iOS and Android devices.

tasks.title: Setup application logging
tasks.description: Implement structured logging throughout application. Include ELK stack setup for log aggregation and analysis.

tasks.title: Security audit checklist
tasks.description: Review application for security vulnerabilities. Check for OWASP Top 10, dependency vulnerabilities, and configuration issues.
